Import TensorFlow and other necessary modules from the provided list of dependencies
Load the dataset and prepare it for training by splitting into training and validation sets
Define the batch size, image dimensions, and number of classes based on the given specifications
Create a generator function to load and preprocess batches of images and bounding boxes from the dataset
Initialize the YOLOV8 backbone using `keras_cv.models.YOLOV8Backbone.from_preset` with 'yolo_v8_s_backbone_coco' preset
Build the YOLOV8Detector model by passing the initialized backbone, number of classes, bounding box format, and FPN depth to `keras_cv.models.YOLOV8Detector`
Compile the YOLOV8Detector model with Adam optimizer and specified classification and box losses
Create an instance of `EvaluateCOCOMetricsCallback` to monitor the COCO metrics during training
Train the YOLOV8Detector model on the training data using `fit` method with validation data and the custom callback
Assert that the training process produces NaN values in the loss calculation during one epoch
Monitor the GPU memory usage during the training process
